title: Mooney Putt Portals
description:
Mooney Putt Portals
Interdimensional mini golf experiment
How it works
•	There are 9 portals—visit in any order.
•	Use the map to hunt them down.
•	Keep score—weird trophies and shiny prizes lurk.
•	Claim a sticker. Adorn your self or your stuff.
•	Putters and balls live at each hole—please leave them in their native realm.
•	Bring your own freaky putter for a 3 stroke bonus.
•	Share the magic: don’t whack humans.
•	Putt, giggle, repeat.
Step through a portal and play a hole!

title: The Next Generation - Meet up for Minors
description: Hosted by the Garden Party kids, this meet up is for the next generation of burners and the people who are raising them! Make new connections and get tips on burning with kids from kids.

title: Synesthetic Ritual of Sensory Surrender
description: Reset your senses. Join us for an immersive experience featuring four-hand massage, warm wax, and violet wand electricity. From the grounding rhythm of impact to the enveloping waves of light and sound, we invite you into a high-sensory environment created to stimulate and heighten presence.

title: How We Roll - 101
description: Come join fellow Dudes at Abiding Grove for a workshop on the finer art of rolling like a Duder. Former resident Dudeist Priest of Amsterdam, Cake Man, will guide aspiring rollers through shaping techniques and the gentle philosophy behind the craft. Bring your own supplies to roll with, though we'll have some of the Dude's business papers available on-site. Relaxed vibes and curious minds welcome.\nThursday • 4:20 PM • ~60 min

title: Ranger Training
description:
This training is intended for anyone with an Alpha Ranger, Dirt Ranger, or Khaki Ranger volunteer shift at ToTheMoon -- or anyone who just wants to learn more about these awesome volunteers. 

ToTheMoon Rangers team is looking for quite a few volunteers to join their team! Rangers aren’t security or bouncers or police…but they are sober adults in cargo pants and matching shirts that walk the burn and assist in mediation or connecting you with the type of help you may need… These volunteers are extremely important and help keep the burn a safe space for everyone. 

NOTE: Please bring your own water bottle, chair/blanket, sun protection, snack, and/or stuffie to the training to exemplify your Radical Self-Reliance.

title: Karaoke
description: We will be hosting kwraoke while we are cooking and serving food!
location: A Little Bit All Over The Place

title: Flow As You Go - Grotto flow jam
description: Open flow jam - flow as you go

title: Fire Safety Meeting
description:
Fire performers must attend one of the fire safety meetingsand obtain a piece of Conclave swag. This swag will enable you to spin fire throughout the burn in the various camps and participate in the Conclave Saturday night. 

Fire performers must only fire perform in designated performance areas separated from the crowd under the supervision of an aware, trained safety with blanket in hand or on the ground in front of them. Before each burn, check that your physical state (props, fuel, skills, wind speed, and clothing) and mental state (sober!) are appropriate. All Conclave participants (fire performers and fire safety volunteers, new and experienced) must attend one of the fire safety meetings listed below at the effigy field, and please bring fuel donations. There will be live fire demonstrations, so please wear fire-safe clothing.

For all these meetings and events, bring your safeties! New or veteran, we would be overjoyed for you to spin fire with us!

title: Drum Circle
description:
Calling all drummers, dancers, rhythm chasers & vibe makers. We’re forming a drum circle near the temple at 6:30PM. Bring your drum.
Bring your feet.
Bring your energy.

Or just bring yourself and jump in. Follow the sound. Find the circle.

title: Soup!!!! Soup!!!!
description: Ever night you can join us for dinner, usually we make delicous soups and stews.  Dinner starts whenever food is done and ends whenever we run out.
location: A Little Bit All Over The Place

title: Sanctuary Volunteers Meet and Greet
description: A meet and greet for the Sanctuary volunteers. Get to know the leads and meet your fellow support staff. Have questions? This is a great time to get answers and see the space. Thank you for volunteering with Sanctuary!

title: Meowgarita party!
description:
Dust off your whiskers and brush off your fancy ears and slip on your finest feline flair for a night of purrfectly unhinged decadence. We’re serving custom cat-themed margaritas, glowing vibes, and enough cat ears to summon nine lives’ worth of chaos.

Come dressed as a sassy housecat, ferocious tiger, mysterious sphinx, disco panther, or whatever strange creature inspires.

Expect roaming cats, fuzzy fashion, and late-night mischief under the stars.

No humans allowed. Only cats in disguise.

description: Wind down from the party with a guided meditation. Step through the Portal with me to meet the elves and explore their bioluminescent realm as they support us in our Regenesis. We wash away the old outdated versions of us and they nurture our new growth, celebrating the You that you get to discover anew.

description: Pole Abiding 101\nFriday • 11:00 AM • ~90 min\nThe Dude way is balance, flow, and not fighting the universe too hard. Join Smooth for a beginner-friendly outdoor pole dance session where style matters less than attitude. Come laugh, move around, and discover that maybe the pole isn't the enemy here. Weather permitting. Bar beverages available because hydration is part of the path.

I've got TCM teas made to bring you back to life and sweeter treats like rose falooda to lift your spirits. 11am til we run out. Come by each day for different elixirs. Water station always available.

title: Gluten Free Friday Tea Party
description:
Radical Inclusion through food! The Gluten Free Friday Tea Party is a celebration of and for all of us with tummy troubles! In order to avoid cross contamination, I am partnering with a bakery that describes itself as:

Certified gluten-free by the National Celiac Association and entirely wheat-free, seed oil-free, nut-free, vegan, dairy-free, egg-free, seed-free & natural dyes only. 

We will have all kinds of safe snacks, tea, and a social hour where you are welcome to say as much about the gory details of your tummy troubles as you want or absolutely nothing at all about them. 🩷❤️🩷

title: Molten Moments: A Live Glassworking Experience
description: Take a captivating look into flame-worked glass, where fire and artistry converge. Watch raw glass rods transform under intense heat and delicate control into intricate forms. This demo highlights key tools, safety practices, and techniques—revealing how precision and temperature shape the craft. Perfect for newcomers and seasoned creatives, it offers a close-up view of chemistry and creativity in glowing harmony. Stay after to ask questions and explore the tools behind the magic.

title: Brother Jon's Birthday
description: Do you know Brother Jon (once known as Beef Supreme,)? Did you know he's a year older as of June 5th? Well, now you do and you are invited to his birthday party. There will be music, booze, snacks, merry making, and Brother Jon.

title: Get Glow'd
description: Humans already bioluminesce, just too softly to see. Let's make it visible. Come reconnect with your inner light through glow in the dark paints. \n\nPaint yourself, paint your clothes, paint your friends. Or adorn with henna for a different kind of glow.

title: Open Arena!!
description: The gates of the Arena open and the Mob goes wild! Gladiator Warz has been released upon the burn! Come on down and beat your opponents senseless in the best adult bopper game of the East coast! Choose helmet, armor, and weapons to get in the ring and DOMINATE!

title: Rockband Karaoke!
description: Remember Guitar Hero? Rockband Karaoke is like normal karaoke, except all the songs played through the Rockband video game! We have vocals, drums and two guitar controllers to sing+play through the best songs rockband has to offer. Come sign up with your squad, or come solo and we will build a band around you. The best way to experience being in a band without actually needing to know how to play an instrument, guaranteed

title: The Evolving Edge: Kink, Connection, and the Long-Term Partnership
description:
Midday Lightly Guided Conversation

When you’ve been together for years, and playing together for just as long, the conversation changes. It’s no longer about discovery in the beginner sense; it’s about evolution.

How do our kinks shift as our bodies change? How do we stay open to new energy when we share domestic life? How do we mediate shared history? 

Join us for a relaxed, lightly facilitated midday honest conversation with other long-term partners.

We hope to go beyond the basics and discuss the nuances of a seasoned kink life:
•The Integration Phase: Moving past scene night and looking at how power, play, and intimacy weave into the fabric of a long-term life.
•The Changing Body: Navigating physical shifts, energy levels, and new boundaries with grace and creativity.
•Deepening the Script: Breaking out of autopilot play and finding new edges within a familiar partnership.
•Emotional Sustainability: Managing the Aftercare of a decade-long relationship.

This is a peer-level space for couples who are already active and looking for a thoughtful,  environment to talk shop. We provide the prompts and the structure; you provide the lived experience.

Expect a friendly, high-trust atmosphere where the goal isn't to fix anything, but to honor where you’ve been and explore where you’re going next.

title: MIMOSAS & METAL IN THE MORNING
description:
You're invited! Join us Saturday at 11:00 a.m. as Camp Just People hosts its signature morning event — Mimosas & Metal in the Morning!

Come kick back with a perfectly crafted mimosa while our resident DJ, Jazzy Bill D Funk, takes you through an electrifying hour of the finest, most unapologetically loud metal the world has to offer.

Expect a refreshing drink, an unforgettable setlist, and zero chill — except for your mimosa.

Black tie and an arrogant attitude are entirely optional.

title: Foreskin Restoration Workshop
description: In the United States the circumcision of an infant is considered normal. But some people impacted by this action come to view it as a non-consensual genital modification. Circumcision can have negative consequences: reduced sensitivity, curvature of the penis, painful erections and more. Come to this workshop to learn about foreskin restoration. These are methods to grow the skin of the penis with consistent stretching (think ear gauging) to ultimately gain enough tissue for the appearance and functionality of a foreskin. You’ll learn about the history of circumcision in the USA, the anatomy of the penis (do you know where your raphe is?) and about foreskin restoration techniques and resources. I will demonstrate manual stretching exercises and the usage of some commercially available tuggers. The tuggers will be available for people to try out after the lecture. Come with your dick questions.

title: Figure Drawing and Chill
description: For those who would like to practice drawing the human form! We will draw people in different poses over varying periods of time. Paper, pencils, and clipboards will be provided. People are encouraged to volunteer to model (you don't have to be nude unless you want to!). It's just chilling and drawing.

title: ReBirthDay Party
description:
💖Happy ReBirthDay🌱

In support of Participation, Communal Effort, and Gifting, Garden Party is delighted to host a ReBirthDay Party for YOU! 

We are providing a ReBirthDay cake, sweet treats, salty and savory snacks and presents! 

We hope YOU are bringing:
🎨 Face painting
🤹 Jugglers & flow artists
🎶 Musicians & wandering instrumentalists
📖 Poetry readers & storytellers
🎤 Singers & sing-a-long leaders
🛠 Teachers of curious skills & hobbies
😂 Stand-up comics & delightfully bad comedians
🔮 Tarot readers, oracle readers & mystical beings

This is not about perfection.
This is about participation, play, connection, expression, and creating moments together.

Whether you are wildly talented, charmingly awkward, deeply soulful, or charismatically chaotic — there is a place for you at the party.

Bring a gift.
Bring a skill.
Bring a ridiculous idea.
Bring your strange little spark.
Bring your magical presence.

Don't forget to pick up your ReBirth Certificate before you leave!

description: A chance for all burners who are burning clean, in Recovery, Sober, or even just sober-curious, to meet like-minded burners and check-in with each other. It's a great way to grow your network of support for whatever your path may be. ALL ARE WELCOME!!

title: Elven Elixirs
description: Do you party too hard? Or just need some rejuvenation? Your resident elven herbalist has your back. I've got TCM teas made to bring you back to life and sweeter treats like rose falooda to lift your spirits. 11am til we run out. Come by each day for different elixirs. Water station always available.

title: Self-Care Sunday
description: Need some rejuvenation after a wild night of burning? Come experience REGENESIS at the Surreal Saloon. We will have Interdimensional Moon Juice (a non-alcoholic electrolyte beverage) available to fuel your vessel. We will also have self care supplies available including face masks, lotions, nail care products, sensory toys and others. Come join us for a burn essential - Self Care Sunday.

title: Flotilla party on the lake
description: Hey amazing people, when we last came to TTM two years ago we got a Flotilla together on the lake at 1:00 on the Sunday and about 50 rafts showed up and we had ourselves a fun ‘ol time. Let’s do that again, shall we. Same time and place, weather permitting. BYO Raft.

title: Ice Sales 🧊
description: 7lb bags of ice will be available for purchase at $5 Thursday through Sunday from 10–7pm adjacent to the quartermaster. Price and bag size subject to change based on availability. Cash, tap to pay, or Venmo, are accepted.

title: Integration Circle
description: How has this burn changed you? What magic did you experience? \n\nHere you can share what's on your heart, witness and be witnessed, as we process our time on this land together in community.

title: Hypnotic Regenesis
description: Tap into the past, activate presence and generate the future! Immerse yourself in this guided experience of hypnotic trance, neuro-linguistic programming and heightened, conscious awareness with New Technique!

title: Karaoke
description: We will be hosting kwraoke while we are cooking and serving food!
location: A Little Bit All Over The Place

title: Soup!!!! Soup!!!!
description: Ever night you can join us for dinner, usually we make delicous soups and stews.  Dinner starts whenever food is done and ends whenever we run out.

title: Temple Art Burn 🔥
description: Temple Art Burn begins shortly after dusk on Sunday night
